default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define Mark's immediate outreach strategy for AI automation clients.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prioritize Upwork & Cold Email:** Immediately activate outreach on Upwork and with cold email (using the proven "dead lead reactivation" angle) to generate revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [**Track Daily Metrics:** Implement daily tracking of outreach volume (proposals, emails) and results (replies, calls booked) to enable data-driven optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Differentiate on Upwork:** Stand out from automated proposals by submitting personalized Loom videos that read the job description back to the client, proving engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [**Position as an Enabler:** Frame AI as a tool to empower existing teams, not replace them, to overcome client fear of disruption and job loss.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

## Topics

### Current Client Project

  - [**Client:** Outsourced operations for churches (warm lead).](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [**Problem:** Manual sales processes (proposals, contracts, onboarding).](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pre-built n8n flow to automate the sales system.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Proposed Pricing Model:** Performance-based, taking 30% of annual savings.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This model is compelling because it highlights long-term value, not just a one-time fee.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**Alternative:** A low-cost "foot-in-the-door" offer (\~$500) could be an easier first sale.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Follow-up call scheduled for Dec 29/30.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

### Outreach Strategy & Market Insights

  - [**Upwork:** A proven channel for initial clients.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [**Success Story:** Dobby used Upwork to land hourly gigs, then upsold clients to retainers.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Use Upwork as a market research tool to identify common pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Cold Email:** Now proven effective for AI automation.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [**Success Story:** Dobby's campaign (run by Justin) is averaging \~1 lead/day after 2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [**Winning Angle:** "Lead nurture automation that revives dead leads."](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Future Test:** Hyper-specific HubSpot automations to target larger organizations.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**Market Psychology:**](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Primary Fear:** Clients are afraid of breaking what's already working.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** Clients prefer empowering their team with AI, not replacing staff.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Effective Messaging:** Frame AI as a way to "get more out of your team" and solve personal bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Execution Plan

  - [**Immediate Focus:** Pause Trello board tasks and prioritize revenue-generating outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [**Daily Tracking:** Implement a system to track daily metrics (proposals, emails, replies, calls booked) to enable data-driven optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Upwork Differentiation:**](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**Problem:** High competition (50+ applications per job).](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**Solution:** Submit a personalized Loom video with each proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
          - [**Content:** Read the job description back to the client → state expertise → offer a call.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This proves engagement and stands out from generic, automated responses.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [**Cold Email Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
      - [**Infrastructure:** Mailboxes are warmed on Instantly and ready.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Draft copy using the "dead lead reactivation" angle.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - **Resource:** Use the `#cold-email-2025` Slack channel for copy feedback.

## Next Steps

  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
      - [Activate cold email campaigns using the "dead lead reactivation" angle.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [Resume Upwork outreach (1–3 proposals/day), using personalized Loom videos.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Implement daily tracking for all outreach metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [Connect with Dobby and Justin on Slack for insights.](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Follow up on the church client project (Dec 29/30).](https://fathom.video/share/bNh9E6k6mP6GQMxuK8VZNyZ1Nhry2z--?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

action_items.description: Set daily outreach targets; send daily metrics to Kasey
Draft cold email copy (lead nurture/reactivation); post in Slack #cold-email-2025 for feedback
Review Kajabi re: Instantly setup; launch cold email campaign
